name: CARE Imports
description: Bulk data import and export plugin for CARE. Helps hospital administrators set up facilities by importing users, departments, locations, medications, lab tests, and more from CSV files with validation and review workflows.

standardConfigurations.title: Local development
standardConfigurations.description: Attach the local preview output from care_imports_fe for development and manual testing.

appBaseUrl.label: App base URL
appBaseUrl.description: Base URL where the frontend plug is served.

custom.label: Custom environments
custom.description: Add extra environment variables for advanced setup.

rawSetup.title: Raw setup
rawSetup.description: Start with a minimal plug_config and edit it directly.
